title: Creating and Composing Components
description: Build small components and combine them.

slides.title: Compose Like LEGO® 🧩
slides.content:
# Components Inside Components

You can render a component inside another component – this is **composition**. It lets you build complex UIs from simple pieces.

For example, a `Page` component might render a `Header`, `Sidebar`, and `Footer`.

slides.title: Example: Composing Components

quizData.question: A component can render other components.
quizData.explanation: Absolutely! That's the whole idea of composition – you build UIs by nesting components.
